description: An order is being shipped internationally and requires a commercial invoice and customs declaration.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the sales order and verify all product details, including country of origin and HS codes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all necessary customs information is present on the order.

nodes.task_description: Generate the commercial invoice based on the order details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the commercial invoice document.

nodes.task_description: Complete and print the required customs declaration form (e.g., CN22/23).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the appropriate customs form for the destination country.
